# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

variables:
  vmNamePrefix: "devvm"
  location: "East US"
  adminUsername: "adminuser"
  adminPassword: "ComplexPassword123!"
  vmSize: "Standard_D2s_v3"
  imageReference:
    publisher: "Canonical"
    offer: "UbuntuServer"
    sku: "18.04-LTS"
    version: "latest"

resources:
- name: "vnet"
  type: "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks"
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  location: "[variables('location')]"
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - "10.0.0.0/16"
    subnets:
      - name: "subnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/24"

- name: "publicIp1"
  type: "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses"
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  location: "[variables('location')]"
  properties:
    publicIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"

- name: "publicIp2"
  type: "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses"
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  location: "[variables('location')]"
  properties:
    publicIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"

- name: "nic1"
  type: "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces"
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  location: "[variables('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "vnet"
    - "publicIp1"
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: "ipconfig1"
        properties:
          privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
          subnet:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', 'vnet', 'subnet')]"
          publicIPAddress:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', 'publicIp1')]"

- name: "nic2"
  type: "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces"
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  location: "[variables('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "vnet"
    - "publicIp2"
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: "ipconfig1"
        properties:
          privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
          subnet:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', 'vnet', 'subnet')]"
          publicIPAddress:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', 'publicIp2')]"

- name: "vm1"
  type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  location: "[variables('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "nic1"
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: "[variables('vmSize')]"
    osProfile:
      computerName: "[concat(variables('vmNamePrefix'), '01')]"
      adminUsername: "[variables('adminUsername')]"
      adminPassword: "[variables('adminPassword')]"
    storageProfile:
      imageReference: "[variables('imageReference')]"
      osDisk:
        createOption: "FromImage"
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: "Standard_LRS"
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'nic1')]"

- name: "vm2"
  type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  location: "[variables('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "nic2"
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: "[variables('vmSize')]"
    osProfile:
      computerName: "[concat(variables('vmNamePrefix'), '02')]"
      adminUsername: "[variables('adminUsername')]"
      adminPassword: "[variables('adminPassword')]"
    storageProfile:
      imageReference: "[variables('imageReference')]"
      osDisk:
        createOption: "FromImage"
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: "Standard_LRS"
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'nic2')]"
